channel.title: Utilities on Notities
channel.description: Recent content in Utilities on Notities

item.title: Compress photos without quality loss for any platform
item.description:
P.S. Special thanks to Maria Isabel Rondini
She inspired this article as part of the research for her thesis, where she could use some extra attention for the tool ImageCompressor.

Do you want to make your photos smaller in size without losing quality?
Good news: you don’t need to install any software for that!
With the online tool ImageCompressor, you can simply upload your photos and compress them directly in your browser.
That means it doesn’t matter whether you’re working on Windows, Linux, or macOS—as long as you have an internet connection, you can easily compress your photos.

item.title: Create a website for free with GitHub Pages
item.description:
Create a website for free with GitHub


P.S. Would you like somebody to help you? Feel free to send me a message on one of my Social Media Links available on this website.

item.title: Automatically log in to Windows
item.description:
Entering a password or PIN is not equally convenient for everyone.
Do you find it annoying to enter a password or PIN every time you log in to Windows?
You can also automatically log in to Windows. When the computer has finished starting up, you will immediately see the desktop. On the desktop you can make all your useful programs accessible and you have that immediately in front of you when you have turned on the computer. You can then immediately start using the computer, without having to enter a password or PIN first.
